case_title: GOODIN, BOB, AS TRUSTEE vs. BORDLEY, BARBARA K. et al

docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BORDLEY, BARBARA K. BORDLEY, CALLIE MAE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BORDLEY, BARBARA K. BORDLEY, CALLIE MAE

#6, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - RPT, M.LYON - CLERK, G.DECKER C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JEFF MARGULIES AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT UNDER FOLLOWING TERMS - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1503 MC- KENNON, S.F, CA. - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 1-21-97, 5PM - NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION ALLOW- ED - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - $11,406 RENT & DAMAGES WVD.IF DEFS. MEET ALL TERMS OF AGREEMENT - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS, INCLUDING #136805 TO BE DISMISSED BY DEFS. - ALL KEYS W/CONFIRMING LETTER TO BE LEFT AT MR. MARGULIES' OFFICE PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORDLEY, BARBARA K. BORDLEY, CALLIE MAE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1503 MCKINNON AVE, S.F, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, $11,406 RENT & DAMAGES WVD IF DEFS MEET ALL TERMS OF STIP. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. DEFS. TO DISM CASE #136805. PROPER TY LEFT ON PRIMESES DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOODIN, BOB, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE GOODIN REALTY PROFIT SHARING PLAN AS TO DEFENDANT BORDLEY, BARBARA K. BORDLEY, CALLIE MAE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
